commit_message:
Slowadcupgrade Slowadcupgrade Update of the SlowADC IP to make it more versatile. It allows:
   - Configuring the ADC's data output
   - Setting configuration via generics
   - Reads DRDY from registers instead of using the pin (it saves one input of the FPGA per ADC (plus level translators) and fixes the possible issue of having multiple DRDY connected in parallel (e.g.: on the TXI board))
   - Adding of a stream output that provide channel data as soon as they are read with a read enable s

examples.commit_message:
Slowadcupgrade Slowadcupgrade Update of the SlowADC IP to make it more versatile. It allows:
   - Configuring the ADC's data output
   - Setting configuration via generics
   - Reads DRDY from registers instead of using the pin (it saves one input of the FPGA per ADC (plus level translators) and fixes the possible issue of having multiple DRDY connected in parallel (e.g.: on the TXI board))
   - Adding of a stream output that provide channel data as soon as they are read with a read enable s
